segments.text: By not trying at all, by giving into hopelessness, I'm even robbing myself of that opportunity that's possible.
Imagine there's a dart board target on the wall. If I shoot 20 darts, I might hit one. But if I just shoot one dart, I
might hit it or more chances are I might miss it. It is in my own favor and best possibility being that I hit as many
dots as I can in this duration. So that at least if there is one chance, one out of 20 chance of a dart hitting the aim,
